title: Seeds Bag
description: For farmers who are troubled by too many types of seeds
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f04c8ad66a9cc2f174f88d12a685a574033f6294_0.webp) ## **Any 'seed' is fine!** ## **任何“种子”都可以！**
---
Description This mod adds a specialized Seed Bag to the game. It helps you automatically collect seeds and increases farming efficiency. ![all seeds...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/800ad16682cfe6f8ccc1179657cb323cbe1f3bd4.png) ### Key Features: * **Auto-Pickup:** As long as the Seed Bag is in your inventory, any seeds you pick up will automatically be stored inside, preventing inventory clutter. * **Direct Planting:** Right-click on farmland while holding a filled bag to plant seeds directly. It will plant them according to their order within the bag. * **Controls:** The bag functions similarly to the vanilla Bundle. Right-click an empty slot with the bag to move seeds out, or right-click seeds with the bag to store them. * **Capacity:** A single bag can hold up to 512 seeds. > **✅Compatibility:** This mod is compatible with most other mods that correctly use the `c:seeds` or `minecraft:seeds` tags (e.g., Farmer's Delight). ### Crafting Recipes You can obtain the Seed Bag using either of the following methods: **Method 1: Direct Crafting** * **Top Row:** Empty | Any Seed | Empty * **Middle Row:** Leather | String | Leather * **Bottom Row:** Leather | Leather | Leather ![Crafting Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff882b36eea2d8cf0a30bd4c8d97942428d0ed67.png) **Method 2: Transformation** * Combine a **Vanilla Bundle** with **Any Seed** in a crafting grid. ![Crafting Recipe 2：](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/048092509fa2fb8a42b17c58fe43779551bbc69b.png)
介绍 模组在游戏中增加了一个种子袋，能自动收集种子，提升耕种效率。 ![all seeds...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/800ad16682cfe6f8ccc1179657cb323cbe1f3bd4.png) ### 主要功能： * **自动拾取填充：** 只要物品栏中携带种子袋，捡起的种子将自动进入袋内，避免占用背包空格。 * **直接播种：** 手持装有种子的袋子对耕地点击右键即可播种。播种顺序取决于种子在袋内的排列位置。 * **操作方式：** 交互与原版收纳袋一致。用袋子点击空格取出种子，用袋子点击种子进行收纳。 * **容量：** 单个种子袋可容纳 512 个种子。 > **✅兼容性：** 本模组兼容绝大部分将种子正确添加至 `c:seeds` 或 `minecraft:seeds` 标签的模组（如农夫乐事等）。 ### 合成表 你可以通过以下两种方式获得种子袋： **方式一：基础合成** * **顶部：** 空置 | 任意种子 | 空置 * **中间：** 皮革 | 线 | 皮革 * **底部：** 皮革 | 皮革 | 皮革 ![Crafting Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff882b36eea2d8cf0a30bd4c8d97942428d0ed67.png) **方式二：快捷转化** * 在合成栏中放入 **原版收纳袋** + **任意种子** 即可直接合成。 ![Crafting Recipe 2：](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/048092509fa2fb8a42b17c58fe43779551bbc69b.png)
